The Alpha Pilgrimage is when [[Kamidere]] went to [[Gobekli Tepe]] and discovered [[Alpha]].

It was followed by the [[Lambda Pilgrimage]] and then the [[Omega Pilgrimage]]

== Events ==

# [[Malta Pilgrimage]]
#[[Jerusalem Pilgrimage]]
# [[Ukraine Pilgrimage]]
#[[Vision in the Ravine]]
# [[Urfa Pilgrimage]]

== See Also ==

* [[Lambda Pilgrimage]]
* [[Omega Pilgrimage]]

==References==
{{reflist}}


{{Alpha Pilgrimage}}

[[Category:Three Pilgrimages]]
[[Category:Alpha]]
[[sn:Alpha Pilgrimage]][[Category:Alpha Pilgrimage]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
